response.justification: The candidate is a strong and versatile senior developer, but their experience does not align with the core requirements of this role. The mandatory 5-10 years of recent, hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform is not met; the resume shows only a brief C++ role from nearly a decade ago. Furthermore, while there is some experience in the investment domain, it is not in the required Capital Markets or Fixed Income space and was not with a C++ stack. The candidate's expertise is heavily concentrated in web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang) which are not relevant to this position.
strengths: Broad experience as a senior/staff engineer with a variety of languages and technologies.
Strong background in modern development practices like CI/CD, TDD, and containerization.
Excellent communication skills, demonstrated through public speaking, workshops, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ experience; the most recent C++ role was brief and ended in 2015.
No demonstrated experience developing on the Windows platform, which is a mandatory skill.
No experience in the required domains of Capital Markets or Fixed Income.
